scenarios.title: RAG Retrieval Model Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that mention RAGatouille, ColBERT, RAGPretrainedModel, RAGTrainer, late-interaction retrieval, reranking, or RAG pipeline indexing/search.
scenarios.role: Guides agents through RAGatouille's training, indexing, search, reranking, integration, and export APIs with safe dependency and verification checks.
scenarios.read_when: User asks to use RAGatouille, build/search ColBERT indexes, prepare RAG training data, rerank candidate documents, integrate with LangChain/LlamaIndex, or export ColBERT checkpoints.
scenarios.best_for: Python RAG pipelines that need RAGatouille-specific API signatures, data formats, metadata handling, troubleshooting, and lightweight offline validation scripts.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is generic vector database work without RAGatouille/ColBERT, asks for a different retrieval package, or targets a post-PyLate RAGatouille release not covered by this source snapshot.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `ragatouille` when RAGatouille-specific APIs or failure modes matter; route inside the skill by whether the task is persisted indexing/search, training-data/fine-tuning, index-free reranking, or framework/export integration.
